# SmartCredit Aave Liquidation Monitor MCP

> Real-time Aave V3 liquidation risk intelligence for Ethereum mainnet borrower positions. Uses a log-normal volatility model to compute liquidation probability, per-asset price thresholds, and tiered risk labels. No authentication required — public endpoint.

## Overview

- **MCP Endpoint:** https://mcp.smartcredit.io/web3-borrow-lend-mcp
- **Transport:** Streamable HTTP (MCP spec 2025-03-26)
- **Auth:** None — public endpoint, no API key required
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/SmartCredit-io/web3-borrow-lend-mcp
- **Website:** https://smartcredit.io
- **Network:** Ethereum mainnet (Aave V3 only)
- **Data Sources:** Aave V3 contracts (live RPC), CoinGecko price feed, Chainlink fallback

## MCP Tools (2)

- `get_liquidation_risk` — Evaluates liquidation probability for an Aave V3 borrower position. Inputs: `user_address` (required), `platform` (default: AAVE), `hf_threshold` (default: 1.5), `loan_term` (default: 7 days), `sigma_window` (default: 30 days). Returns: health factor, collateral/debt balances, liquidation probability, risk tier, per-asset liquidation price thresholds.
- `check_api_health` — Pings the server. No inputs. Returns "ok" or an error string.

## Risk Tiers

- Safe (0–5%) · Watch (5–15%) · Warning (15–35%) · Danger (35–70%) · Critical (70–100%) · Liquidatable (HF < 1.0)

## Claude Code Subagents (6)

Ready-to-use specialist subagents in `.claude/agents/`. Copy into any project after registering the MCP server.

- `smartcredit-liquidation-monitor` — Core liquidation risk check. Returns tier, probability, health factor, and per-asset liquidation prices.
- `smartcredit-health-advisor` — Actionable advice to improve health factor and reduce liquidation probability.
- `smartcredit-threshold-finder` — Extracts per-asset liquidation price thresholds (current price → liquidation price → % drop).
- `smartcredit-stress-tester` — Stress tests a position across 7/14/30/90-day horizons and compares risk across time.
- `smartcredit-portfolio-scanner` — Batch-scans multiple positions and ranks them by liquidation probability.
- `smartcredit-risk-reporter` — Generates a full written risk report suitable for sharing with a team.

## Setup (Claude Code)

```bash
claude mcp add --transport http smartcredit-aave-liquidation-monitor \
  https://mcp.smartcredit.io/web3-borrow-lend-mcp
```

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "smartcredit-aave-liquidation-monitor": {
      "type": "http",
      "url": "https://mcp.smartcredit.io/web3-borrow-lend-mcp"
    }
  }
}
```

## Key Files

- [AGENTS.md](./AGENTS.md) — Machine-readable index of all 6 subagents with triggers, tools, inputs, and outputs
- [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) — Full skill definition for Claude Code, Cursor, and OpenClaw ClawHub
- [CLAUDE.md](./CLAUDE.md) — Project conventions, subagent table, risk tiers, and setup
- [README.md](./README.md) — Full documentation, tool schemas, and integration guides
- [references/tools-liquidation-risk.md](./references/tools-liquidation-risk.md) — `get_liquidation_risk` full schema and parameters
- [references/tools-health.md](./references/tools-health.md) — `check_api_health` usage
